examples: We are shorthanded at the moment.
They're so shorthanded at my cousin Joe's office that he has to wear two hats.
They're so shorthanded at my cousin Joe's office that he has to wear different hats.
In the midst of a stock buyback strategy, Apple found itself shorthanded on U.S.-held cash.
Detroit opened the scoring with a shorthanded goal 6:33 into the opening period.
